race.comment: Tough finish. SHE'S A CON (10) ran a solid race first up at Sale when in the market, getting home nicely to finish sixth, beaten three lengths. First go on the synthetic here but is right up to these and will be very hard to hold out. ISALOT (4) found winning form quickly second-up to break the maiden at Swan Hill in a 0-56. Drawn well and should measure up again. BRAZENGA (1) can mix his form but is up to these on his best and his turf form says the drier the better so synthetic might suit. DARTS DALY (2) is stepping up in trip after finishing tenth over 1300m at Swan Hill last time out. Has claims on the placing two back at Casterton.
